title: lagarinthus diversus
intro: Lagarinthus diversus, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Lagarinthus diversus include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various symptoms.
